title: 幻想三國誌5/Fantasia Sango 5
description:
● Life-and-death Brotherhood and Heart Touching StoryIn this chaos we live, not enough options we can take. Matters of life and death, to whom we shall protect? From those beauties or heroes, who will stay till the end?

● Intrigues and Fight to The Death for The CrownStratagems between Zhuge and Sima, ambitiousness from the hosts, who shall last and who shall pass for this great land?

● A Feast for The Eyes with Its Delicate DesignsDesigned by the original team to keep its authenticity of the franchise. Delicate and stunning graphics will touch your heart!

● Real-time Battle and OperationThe new real-time battle system includes 暗器,連擊, and 陣型, which brings pumped up experience on the battlefield, and also a new type of RPG battle system.

● A Successor and A Brand-new Fantasia SangoContains main characters of this franchise, changes the Sango history through the adventure. Follow the path of those legendary heroes, and create a new one on this land!

● Magnificent and Breathtaking 3D ScenesDesigned by the 3D art designers, recreated those scenes of ancient cities and tremendous battlefields, take you back to the time of the Three Kingdoms.
description_short: Fantasia Sango 5 is based on the post era of the Three Kingdoms. At the time, hosts like Cao Cao and Liu Bei are all gone. Cao Pi, son of Cao Cao, at the northern territory proclaims himself emperor, and uses Sima Yi to start his expansion proactively.

upsells.name: 幻想三國誌5 - 額外英傑召喚包/Fantasia Sango 5 - Extra Heroes Pack
